project_type: Python FastAPI + Jinja2 web dashboard (Bloomberg terminal style)
build_system: pip install -e '.[data]' or pip install -r requirements.txt; no special build step
verification_instructions: 1. Run import check: python3 -c 'from dashboard.app import app'. 2. Run tests: python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements.txt (dependencies already installed in sandbox)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.9+ available. yfinance installed for real-time data. No Docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: Commit to main branch directly. Commit messages in Chinese. No PR needed.

key_patterns.templates: dashboard/templates/ - Jinja2 HTML, extends base.html, uses {% block content %}
key_patterns.css: dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css - single CSS file with CSS variables, dark theme
key_patterns.api: dashboard/app.py - FastAPI routes, /api/* for JSON, /* for HTML pages
key_patterns.data: src/augur/data.py - fetch_market_overview() returns items with price/change_pct, fetch_market_context() for individual tickers
key_patterns.js_in_templates: All JS is inline in template {% block extra_scripts %}, no build step
key_patterns.version: Currently v7.3.0 in app.py FastAPI title and base.html sidebar

directory_structure: dashboard/ (app.py, templates/, static/css/), src/augur/ (core logic), tests/ (pytest), docs/ (documentation)
